name: team series conversion rate from plays range year_offset pools numerator/denominator (wrap)
description: is_rate column whose numerator/denominator are COUNT(DISTINCT ...) series expressions: the range path pools the distinct-counted num/den over the offset window under wrap mode rather than summing per-season conversion rates.
expected_query: with "tca1b32adc1d89eca0cb139b7ad211bb5" as materialized (select "nfl_plays"."off" as "nfl_team", COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN series_result IN ('FIRST_DOWN', 'TOUCHDOWN') THEN CONCAT(esbid, '_', series_seq) END) as team_series_conversion_rate_from_plays_numerator, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN series_result NOT IN ('QB_KNEEL', 'END_OF_HALF') THEN CONCAT(esbid, '_', series_seq) END) as team_series_conversion_rate_from_plays_denominator, "nfl_plays"."year" from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2024, 2025) group by "nfl_plays"."off", "nfl_plays"."year"), "player_year_teams" as materialized (select "pid", "year", (array_agg(nfl_team ORDER BY game_count DESC, nfl_team ASC))[1] as team from (select "player_gamelogs"."pid", "nfl_games"."year", "player_gamelogs"."nfl_team", count(*) as "game_count" from "player_gamelogs" inner join "nfl_games" on "nfl_games"."esbid" = "player_gamelogs"."esbid" where "nfl_games"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_games"."year" in (2024, 2025) and "player_gamelogs"."season_year" in (2024, 2025) group by "player_gamelogs"."pid", "nfl_games"."year", "player_gamelogs"."nfl_team") as "player_year_team_counts" group by "pid", "year"), "tca1b32adc1d89eca0cb139b7ad211bb5_team_stats" as materialized (select "player_year_teams"."pid", sum(tca1b32adc1d89eca0cb139b7ad211bb5.team_series_conversion_rate_from_plays_numerator) as team_series_conversion_rate_from_plays_numerator, sum(tca1b32adc1d89eca0cb139b7ad211bb5.team_series_conversion_rate_from_plays_denominator) as team_series_conversion_rate_from_plays_denominator from "tca1b32adc1d89eca0cb139b7ad211bb5" inner join "player_year_teams" on "player_year_teams"."team" = "tca1b32adc1d89eca0cb139b7ad211bb5"."nfl_team" and "player_year_teams"."year" = "tca1b32adc1d89eca0cb139b7ad211bb5"."year" group by "player_year_teams"."pid") select "player"."pid", player.first_name, player.last_name, (SELECT SUM(tca1b32adc1d89eca0cb139b7ad211bb5_team_stats.team_series_conversion_rate_from_plays_numerator) / NULLIF(SUM(tca1b32adc1d89eca0cb139b7ad211bb5_team_stats.team_series_conversion_rate_from_plays_denominator), 0) FROM tca1b32adc1d89eca0cb139b7ad211bb5_team_stats WHERE tca1b32adc1d89eca0cb139b7ad211bb5_team_stats.pid = player.pid) AS "team_series_conversion_rate_from_plays_0", "player"."primary_position" from "player" left join "player_year_teams" on "player_year_teams"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "player_year_teams"."year" = 2025 group by player.first_name, player.last_name, "player"."pid", "player"."last_name", "player"."first_name", "player"."primary_position" order by "player"."pid" asc limit 500
